title: C6 Corpus Lineage B7 T02 Freeze Packet (candidate-only, mechanical consumption envelope)
description: Machine-consumable freeze packet derived from the live B7 corpus-lineage candidate. It mechanically binds the 57-row / 45+12 shipping corpus, assembled/compat/id-set digests, the D-127 frozen holdout pin sha, the must_not_train/exposure ACL, and D-147 ratification refs. It is CANDIDATE_PACKET_ONLY: is_canonical=false, is_b7_done=false, requires_operator_ceremony=true. It does NOT elevate B7 to DONE/canonical. The schema is a structural contract; the authoritative fail-closed invariants live in the exporter + test_check_c6_corpus_freeze_packet.py. README prose is not a substitute for the schema or the checker.

schema_version.description: Packet envelope schema version. Bump on contract change.

packet_id.description: Stable packet identity for the B7 T02 freeze packet (v1).

package_id.description: Closure-registry package id bound to this packet.

status.description: Packet is mechanical-consumption-only; does NOT elevate B7 to DONE/canonical.

is_canonical.description: Always false on a candidate packet.

is_b7_done.description: B7 T02 freeze/canonical execution receipt is NOT produced by this packet.

requires_operator_ceremony.description: B7 canonical receipt requires an operator ceremony performed by another agent; this packet is not it.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the live B7 corpus-lineage native receipt source (C6CorpusLineage module).

assembled_sha256.description: Hash over packaging rows (lineage metadata retained). All-zero sentinel rejected.

compat_sha256.description: Hash over content rows after stripping lineage metadata (compat fingerprint).

unordered_id_set_sha256.description: Hash over the sorted unique case_id set.

id_set_equals_tracked.description: Assembled case_id set == tracked 57 exact set.

sha256.description: D-127 FROZEN holdout pin sha256 (authoritative; never recomputed/forged).

policy.description: ACL binds the live shipping-corpus must_not_train distribution.
Shipping corpus must NOT be used for training/eval exposure; holdout D-127 is the S9 pin.

state.description: train-eval exposure checker is STILL_OPEN (not a landed repo gate).

ratification_refs.description: D-147 decision ratification refs bound mechanically (cannot forge T01/T02 ratification string).

live_recompute.description: Digests are recomputed live from repo sources on every export.

byte_stable.description: Deterministic canonical JSON; the packet is regenerable and byte-stable.

reject_hash_drift.description: Exporter refuses to emit if any bound source digest drifts from live truth.

non_claims.description: Explicit non-claims: not canonical, not B7 DONE, not C6 acceptance, not T02 freeze authorization, not operator ceremony, not S9/S10 authorization, not candidate signed.
